title: Fetch forms of account by api
excerpt:
Hi team! 
There is any option to retrieve all the forms urls of an account through the api? or in any other way? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team!
There is any option to retrieve all the forms urls of an account through the api? or in any other way?
Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Binatica,

It is not possible to retrieve all forms urls via API.

I believe it is not possible to do it via the UI either, but just in case, please contact support@monday.com to double-check wit the regular support team (this is a developers section).

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
